spec_match.rationale: Uses SpeechRecognition alternatives/confidence and now requests the real local-processing flag processLocally=true rather than the stale ondevice hint.

interactive.rationale: Provides a live microphone capture button, a dynamic slider to modify max alternatives, and renders real-time confidence bar charts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns with the parent description, illustrating confidence scoring across multiple alternative transcripts.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully catches browser support errors and microphone denials, updating the UI with clear warnings.

references.rationale: The see also block now includes the required ChromeStatus feature link 6090916291674112.

design_system.rationale: Integrates showcase CSS variables, features highly-readable contrast ratios, and styles its progress bars with emerald green accents.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
